hero.subtitle: Stop emailing Word files back and forth. Move on from risky templates. Negotiate contracts on a secure platform that finds the optimal compromise for both parties — powered by AI.
hero.cta.subtitle: Stop emailing Word files back and forth. Move on from risky templates.
hero.login: Already have an account? Log in
value.label: Why Dealroom
value.v1.title: No more v12_final_FINAL.docx
value.v1.desc: One single source of truth. Both parties see the same document, with full version history and clause-level commenting.
value.v2.title: AI finds the middle ground
value.v2.desc: Weighted algorithms analyze both parties' priorities and suggest the optimal compromise for each clause. Adversarial → collaborative.
value.v3.title: Work on your own schedule
value.v3.desc: Async-first negotiation. Set priorities, review positions, and respond when it suits you — no more scheduling across time zones.
value.v4.title: Pre-configured for key jurisdictions
value.v4.desc: Clause libraries for California, England & Wales, and Spain. Multi-jurisdictional requirements handled automatically.
workflow.label: How It Works
workflow.s1.title: Customize each clause
workflow.s1.desc: Your chosen contract type and jurisdiction determine the template and clause variables.
workflow.s2.title: Set your priorities
workflow.s2.desc: Mark each clause as must-have or nice-to-have, with flexibility levels.
workflow.s3.title: Invite your counterparty
workflow.s3.desc: They join the dealroom and set their own priorities independently.
workflow.s4.title: Get smart suggestions
workflow.s4.desc: Our algorithm analyzes both positions and suggests the optimal compromise.
workflow.s5.title: Export and sign
workflow.s5.desc: Generate the final version. Invite an attorney to review if needed.
feat.label: Core Capabilities
feat.enc.title: End-to-End Encryption
feat.enc.headline: Security beyond email.
feat.enc.desc: Every negotiation happens on a secure, encrypted platform. No more sensitive contract terms floating across inboxes.
feat.ai.title: AI-Powered Compromise
feat.ai.headline: Find the middle ground, automatically.
feat.ai.desc: Weighted algorithms analyze both parties' priorities and suggest the optimal middle ground for each clause.
feat.cross.title: Cross-Border Ready
feat.cross.headline: Pre-configured for key jurisdictions.
feat.cross.desc: Clause libraries for California, England & Wales, and Spain — with more jurisdictions coming soon.
feat.export.title: Export & Sign
feat.export.headline: From negotiation to execution.
feat.export.desc: Generate a final version for all parties to sign. MSAs, DPAs, SaaS Agreements, NDAs, Pilot Contracts, and Statements of Work.
cta.text: Start negotiating smarter today. Free for startups.
